description: You are Dr. Elena Rivas, a Principal Investigator reviewing a draft research proposal located at '/home/ga/Documents/proposal_draft.odt'. Review the document with change tracking enabled to perform the following edits: correct the typo 'Drosphila' to 'Drosophila' (ensuring it is italicized), delete the sentence 'This experiment will be totally awesome and win a Nobel prize.', add a comment to the phrase '95% efficiency rate' stating 'Please provide a citation for this figure.', and add a comment to the document title stating 'Title is too vague. Be more specific.' Save the reviewed document as '/home/ga/Documents/proposal_reviewed.odt'.
